column1: # Sequence generation and train/val split config
# Each row defines one output dataset.
#   name             — output filename stem (used for data/sequences/ and data/splits/)
#   class0_files     — semicolon-separated BED paths assigned label=0 (benign)
#   class1_files     — semicolon-separated BED paths assigned label=1 (pathogenic)
#   unlabeled_files  — semicolon-separated BED paths with no label column (benchmark/test)
#   split            — yes: generate train/val splits in data/splits/
#                      no:  generate sequences only in data/sequences/
# Leave class0_files and class1_files empty for unlabeled datasets.
# Leave unlabeled_files empty for labeled datasets.
# NOTE: File must end with a blank line or the last dataset row will be silently skipped.
